repos.name: anthropics/claude-plugins-official
repos.desc: Official, Anthropic-managed directory of high quality Claude Code Plugins.

repos.name: colbymchenry/codegraph
repos.desc: Pre-indexed code knowledge graph for Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, and OpenCode — fewer tokens, fewer tool calls, 100% local

repos.name: multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills
repos.desc: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.

repos.name: dotnet/skills
repos.desc: Repository for skills to assist AI coding agents with .NET and C#

repos.name: obra/superpowers
repos.desc: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

repos.name: HKUDS/CLI-Anything
repos.desc: "CLI-Anything: Making ALL Software Agent-Native" -- CLI-Hub: https://clianything.cc/

repos.name: rmyndharis/OpenWA
repos.desc: Free, Open Source, Self-Hosted WhatsApp API Gateway

repos.name: rohitg00/ai-engineering-from-scratch
repos.desc: Learn it. Build it. Ship it for others.

repos.name: teng-lin/notebooklm-py
repos.desc: Unofficial Python API and agentic skill for Google NotebookLM. Full programmatic access to NotebookLM's features—including capabilities the web UI doesn't expose—via Python, CLI, and AI agents like Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw.

repos.name: can1357/oh-my-pi
repos.desc: ⌥ AI Coding agent for the terminal — hash-anchored edits, optimized tool harness, LSP, Python, browser, subagents, and more

repos.name: antoinezambelli/forge
repos.desc: A Python framework for self-hosted LLM tool-calling and multi-step agentic workflows

repos.name: multica-ai/multica
repos.desc: The open-source managed agents platform. Turn coding agents into real teammates — assign tasks, track progress, compound skills.

repos.name: Imbad0202/academic-research-skills
repos.desc: Academic Research Skills for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize

repos.name: trimstray/the-book-of-secret-knowledge
repos.desc: A collection of inspiring lists, manuals, cheatsheets, blogs, hacks, one-liners, cli/web tools and more.

repos.name: truelockmc/streambert
repos.desc: A cross-platform Electron Desktop App to stream and download any Movie, TV Series or Anime in the World. Zero Ads and Tracking

repos.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
repos.desc: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

repos.name: alireza0/s-ui
repos.desc: An advanced Web Panel • Built for SagerNet/Sing-Box

repos.name: Lum1104/Understand-Anything
repos.desc: Graphs that teach > graphs that impress. Turn any code into an interactive knowledge graph you can explore, search, and ask questions about. Works with Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, Gemini CLI, and more.
